get.summary: List active role assignments for one user

delete.summary: Delete own user via external user id

put.summary: Update own user profile via external user id

get.summary: Get user by external user id
Get app info for current user

post.summary: Get detailed activity overview for a user

get.description: Returns all active cron jobs that can be executed by the job runner.

post.description: Executes a single active job immediately by `jobId`.

get.summary: List logical workers and their jobs
get.description: Returns grouped worker lanes with mapped jobs, schedule, urgency and execution order.
Returns enterprise overview counters grouped by worker/domain/urgency for monitoring and job-app dashboards.
Returns in-memory runtime executions currently being processed by this backend instance.
Returns available entitlements for sync. Payload follows the external entitlements contract.

post.description: Assigns an entitlement to a user. Idempotent behavior: existing assignment is updated and returns 200.

get.description: Returns the current entitlement assignment for one user + identifier tuple.

put.description: Updates (or creates) a single entitlement assignment for one user + identifier tuple.

delete.description: Revokes the entitlement assignment. Idempotent: missing assignment still returns success.

get.description: Legacy endpoint for active role assignments.
Legacy endpoint returning active user roles with permissions.

get.summary: Get entitlement sync context by shop assignment id
get.description: Returns the persisted entitlement-sync context row (shop linkage + local assignment references) for a given x-shop-assignment-id.
Returns deterministic usage-overage events for shop-initiated pull billing sync. Endpoint is idempotent via stable externalEventId per event snapshot.
Legacy endpoint: returns sellable role details by numeric role id.

post.summary: Register a device push token for the current user
Send a fresh email-verification link to the current user
Confirm an email-verification token (programmatic / deep-link flow)

get.summary: Browser landing page that consumes the verification token
